# LIFE DECO

A business focused on interior furniture, offering products or services related to furnishing and designing interior living or commercial spaces. The brand likely caters to customers looking to enhance their home or office environments with quality furniture pieces.

Source: https://life-deco.zappy5.app

---

## Consign &amp; Design Your Dream Interiors — LIFE DECO

URL: https://life-deco.zappy5.app
Description: Transform your space with LIFE DECO&#39;s consign &amp; design interiors. Explore reclaimed wood interior design and classic, modern furniture to craft your perfect home or office sanctuary today.

Mobilier d'intérieur, stylisme et harmonie spatiale par LIFE DECO

# Des intérieurs pensés pour une vie belle et inspirée.


### Mobilier haut de gamme et direction d'intérieur pour résidences raffinées, appartements modernes et espaces commerciaux soignés.


Découvrir les Collections
Démarrer une Consultation













## Des meubles qui respirent l'espace.


Découvrez des silhouettes intemporelles, des finitions tactiles et des pièces choisies pour leurs proportions, leur confort et leur longévité.












### Subheading


Text goes here








### Salons


Canapés sculpturaux et fauteuils lounge











### Espaces Repas


Tables raffinées et chaleureuses textures bois











### Espaces de Travail


Bureaux apaisants, étagères et sièges de direction
















## Conçu pour votre façon de vivre


Nous vous aidons à choisir des meubles adaptés à votre style de vie, votre espace et leur valeur durable, grâce à une approche raffinée et soignée.








### Planification spatiale sur mesure


Chaque intérieur est unique. Nous analysons l'architecture de votre pièce, la lumière naturelle et les flux de circulation pour proposer des agencements qui semblent naturels et intentionnels. Sans approximation — juste un design intelligent qui maximise chaque mètre carré.







### Palette de matériaux haut de gamme


Nous sélectionnons des bois massifs, de la pierre naturelle, du laiton brossé et des textiles techniques auprès d'ateliers artisanaux. Chaque matériau est choisi pour sa chaleur tactile, sa durabilité et sa capacité à vieillir avec élégance dans votre intérieur.







### Approvisionnement éco-responsable


La durabilité est au cœur de chaque sélection. Nous privilégions le bois certifié FSC, les finitions à faible teneur en COV et les éléments de design en bois recyclé. Les beaux espaces ne devraient pas coûter la planète — littéralement.







### Conseil design prêt à livrer


Du mood board à l'installation finale, nous fournissons des dossiers de conception clairs et actionnables. Vous recevez un planning mobilier complet, des échantillons de finitions et des guides de placement — tout le nécessaire pour concrétiser la vision sans stress.

























## Des espaces façonnés pour votre vie.


Du studio urbain aux résidences privées spacieuses, LIFE DECO crée des compositions de mobilier qui allient élégance, confort et intention.

Voir Notre Approche Design













## Conçu avec confiance, sélectionné avec soin.


Chaque projet est une collaboration — un équilibre entre conseil serein, goût exceptionnel et pièces durables qui rendent un espace personnel, jamais figé.








« Travailler avec LIFE DECO a transformé notre maison. Leur équipe nous a guidés avec une expertise sereine, transformant notre vision en une réalité au luxe naturel et profondément personnelle. Chaque pièce a été choisie avec intention. »



Propriétaire Luxe

Résidence Privée







« En tant que propriétaire d'un appartement urbain, j'avais besoin de pièces à la fois élégantes et durables. L'approche consign & design de LIFE DECO m'a permis d'obtenir des meubles intemporels et de qualité, parfaitement adaptés à mon espace et mon style de vie. »



Propriétaire Appartement Urbain

City Apartment







« Notre bureau boutique avait besoin d'un rafraîchissement alliant mobilier classique et moderne. LIFE DECO a livré un espace qui inspire tant notre équipe que nos clients — professionnel, chaleureux et impeccablement pensé. »



Boutique Office Client

Commercial Studio














A refined atelier crafting timeless interiors and curated furniture for the modern home.

## Explore Reclaimed Wood &amp; Modern Furniture Collections — LIFE DECO

URL: https://life-deco.zappy5.app/collections
Description: Browse our curated furniture collections blending reclaimed wood interior design with timeless classics and sleek modern pieces. Find your statement piece and elevate every room now.

Collections

Accueil

- Accueil
- Collections
- Services Design
- À Propos

Contact










# Curated furniture collections.



Discover refined furniture selections for living rooms, dining spaces, bedrooms, workspaces, and hospitality-inspired lounges.












## Our Curated Collections


Discover furniture designed for modern living — each piece selected for its proportion, material integrity, and everyday comfort.











### Sofas and Lounge Seating


Generous proportions and natural materials define our seating collection. From deep linen sectionals to sculptural lounge chairs, each piece balances architectural form with the softness required for daily relaxation.











### Dining Tables and Chairs


Gather around tables crafted from solid oak and walnut, paired with chairs that offer both support and elegance. Our dining pieces are built to anchor meals, conversations, and the rituals of everyday life.











### Storage and Shelving


Thoughtful storage solutions that celebrate material honesty. Open shelving in ash and oak, sideboards with soft-close drawers, and modular systems that adapt to your space — keeping clutter out of sight without sacrificing style.











### Bedroom and Accent Pieces


Create a personal sanctuary with beds, nightstands, and accent furniture that prioritize comfort and quiet elegance. Upholstered headboards, marble surfaces, and warm metal accents bring a refined, restful character to your most private spaces.













## Materials selected for lasting beauty.






### Natural woods


Our walnut and oak pieces are chosen for their deep, expressive grain and warm tonal range. Each surface is hand-finished to reveal the wood's natural character, creating furniture that feels both grounded and refined.






### Performance fabrics


Linen, bouclé, and high-performance weaves offer a soft hand while standing up to daily life. We select textiles with enduring texture and natural color depth, ensuring upholstery that ages gracefully.






### Stone and metal accents


Brushed brass, honed marble, and matte black steel introduce quiet contrast. These accents are sourced with intention, adding architectural presence without overpowering the room.





Every material we specify is traced to responsible sources, reflecting a commitment to craftsmanship that considers both origin and longevity.






















## Need help choosing the right pieces?


Share your space, mood, and priorities, and LIFE DECO will guide a refined furniture direction.

Contact










A refined atelier crafting timeless interiors and curated furniture for the modern home.

## Let&#39;s Consign &amp; Design Interiors That Inspire — LIFE DECO

URL: https://life-deco.zappy5.app/services-design
Description: Our expert design services bring consign &amp; design interiors to life with reclaimed wood accents and tailored layouts. Schedule your consultation and reimagine your space today.

Services Design




























Skip to main content










Accueil

- Accueil
- Collections
- Services Design
- À Propos
- Contact


Contact











# Interior direction for refined spaces.


LIFE DECO helps transform rooms through furniture selection, layout planning, material coordination, and styling direction.

Explore Our Services




























## Our Design Process


A refined, four-step approach to crafting timeless interiors and curated furniture selections for your home or office.





01


### Understand the Space


We begin by listening to your vision and analyzing the architecture, natural light, and flow of your interior. Every project starts with a deep understanding of how you live and move within your environment.







02


### Define Mood & Function


We translate your aspirations into a tactile mood board — balancing comfort, elegance, and purpose. Textures, palettes, and spatial rhythms are carefully mapped to ensure every piece serves both beauty and daily life.







03


### Curate Furniture & Finishes


Drawing from our collection of classic and modern interior furniture, we hand-select pieces that harmonize with your space. From reclaimed wood accents to bespoke upholstery, every item is chosen for its craftsmanship and character.







04


### Deliver a Cohesive Direction


We present a fully resolved design scheme — complete with furniture layouts, finish schedules, and styling notes — so your interior feels effortless, layered, and unmistakably yours. The result is a home that tells your story with warmth and sophistication.






Contact












## Our Core Capabilities


Every project is shaped by a refined set of disciplines, blending timeless design principles with modern sensibilities.











### Furniture Curation


We source and select pieces that balance form, function, and provenance, ensuring every item earns its place in your interior.










### Space Planning


Thoughtful spatial layouts that optimize flow, light, and proportion, turning square footage into beautifully functional living.










### Material Palettes


Curated combinations of wood, stone, metal, and textile that create depth, warmth, and a cohesive narrative throughout your space.










### Styling Direction


The final layer of artistry — accessories, art placement, and objet selection that give a room its soul and personality.










### Commercial Lounge Concepts


Bespoke hospitality and workplace lounges designed for comfort, durability, and a memorable guest experience.










### Eco-Conscious Alternatives


Sustainable materials and responsible sourcing practices woven into every design decision, without compromising on luxury or longevity.











## From blank room to composed living.


A sample apartment transformation focused on proportion, light, storage, and a calmer daily rhythm. Our consign & design interiors approach ensures every piece contributes to a harmonious whole.


- Better flow

- Warmer materials

- Timeless furniture foundation


Discuss Your Space


















A refined atelier crafting timeless interiors and curated furniture for the modern home.

## Meet the Artisans Behind Reclaimed Wood Design — LIFE DECO

URL: https://life-deco.zappy5.app/propos
Description: Discover LIFE DECO&#39;s passion for consign &amp; design interiors and reclaimed wood craftsmanship. Learn how we blend classic and modern furniture to create spaces with soul and style.

À Propos

- À Propos

Contact











# A quieter way to create beautiful interiors.


LIFE DECO brings together thoughtful furniture, balanced spatial planning, and timeless materials for homes and commercial spaces that feel calm, personal, and enduring.














## Our Design Philosophy


Every piece we select and every space we shape is guided by three core principles that define the LIFE DECO experience.






### Timeless Over Trendy


We believe in enduring beauty that transcends passing fads. Our collections favor classic proportions, honest materials, and silhouettes that feel as relevant in a decade as they do today. This is not about nostalgia — it's about investing in pieces that age gracefully alongside your life.





### Comfort With Proportion


A beautifully designed room means nothing if it doesn't invite you to stay. We pair ergonomic comfort with thoughtful scale — sofas deep enough for Sunday afternoons, dining tables that breathe with the room, lighting calibrated to the way you actually live. Every dimension serves a purpose.





### Responsible Material Choices


Luxury and responsibility are not opposites. We source FSC-certified timbers, low-VOC finishes, and natural fibers from mills with transparent supply chains. When we use reclaimed wood in our interior design, it carries a story — one of renewal, not depletion. This is furniture made with conscience.
























## The atelier approach.


Every recommendation begins with atmosphere, daily rhythm, and the character of the space. LIFE DECO treats furniture as part of a larger interior composition — not isolated objects, but elements that shape how a room feels, breathes, and welcomes. From the first fabric swatch to the final furniture placement, our atelier method considers light, texture, proportion, and the quiet stories that make a house a home.

Contact







## Designed to feel effortless for years.


The goal is not to fill a room, but to compose a space that supports how you live, host, work, and rest. We believe in consign & design interiors that balance classic and modern interior furniture with enduring character.







Considered selections





Enduring atmosphere



Contact















A refined atelier crafting timeless interiors and curated furniture for the modern home.

## Start Your Consign &amp; Design Journey Today — LIFE DECO

URL: https://life-deco.zappy5.app/contact
Description: Ready to transform your interior? Contact LIFE DECO for consign &amp; design interiors, reclaimed wood furniture sourcing, or a personalized design consultation. Let&#39;s talk style.

# Let us shape your next interior.


Tell LIFE DECO about your home, apartment, or commercial space, and receive thoughtful guidance for furniture and interior direction.

Start Your Project













Get in Touch

## Start Your Design Journey


Tell us about your space, and our team will craft a tailored proposal for your interior furniture needs.




Full Name





Email Address



Phone Number





Your Message






I have read and agree to the  Terms & Conditions  and  Privacy Policy



Send Inquiry








### How We Work


To help us prepare the best possible proposal for your interior furniture project, please include the following details in your message:



- Room Type & Function – Living room, bedroom, home office, or commercial space.

- Approximate Space Size – Dimensions in feet or meters to help us plan the layout.

- Preferred Atmosphere – Minimalist, classic, modern, or eclectic. Share any inspiration images.

- Furniture Priorities – Key pieces you need, such as a sofa, dining table, or storage solutions.







Prefer to speak directly? Call us at or email .














## Let's Start the Conversation


Every space tells a story. Share yours with us and we'll help you bring it to life with timeless furniture and refined interior styling.









### What to Share


Tell us about your space, your vision, and the feeling you want to create. Whether you have a complete moodboard or just a single inspiration image, we'll guide you from concept to completion. Share your room dimensions, preferred materials, and any specific pieces you've been dreaming of.








### How We Respond


Expect a thoughtful reply within 24 hours. We don't do automated responses — every inquiry is reviewed personally by a senior designer who will prepare initial ideas, material suggestions, and a clear outline of next steps tailored to your project.








### Projects We Support


From a single statement armchair for your apartment to a full-home furnishing plan, we work with homeowners, apartment dwellers, and boutique commercial clients. Our consign & design interiors approach blends curated vintage finds with classic and modern interior furniture for spaces that feel collected, not decorated.










## Begin with a room, a mood, or a single piece.


LIFE DECO will help turn your starting point into a composed interior direction.

Send Your Inquiry














A refined atelier crafting timeless interiors and curated furniture for the modern home.

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://life-deco.zappy5.app/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy
























Accueil

- Accueil
- Collections

Contact








# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  7/9/2026



LIFE DECO ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: LIFE DECO

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://life-deco.zappy5.app/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement
























Accueil

- Accueil
- Collections
- Services Design

Contact








# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  July 9, 2026



LIFE DECO is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: LIFE DECO

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.














A refined atelier crafting timeless interiors and curated furniture for the modern home.

## Terms & Conditions

Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions

Contact








# Terms of Use



Last updated:  July 9, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - LIFE DECO

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Interior Design & Furniture provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


LIFE DECO provides Interior Design & Furniture through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by LIFE DECO. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: LIFE DECO

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
